entries.parsedImagePrompt: Over-the-shoulder close-up static composition from behind Hạ An, with Thẩm Mặc's face dominating the foreground in sharp focus at center-left of the frame. Two distinct characters with completely different outfits and features: In the foreground, Thẩm Mặc, a man in his thirties with sharp angled jaw, defined facial structure, narrow eagle-like eyes with contracted pupils, slanted brows drawn slightly together, high-bridged nose, thin lips pressed in a hard straight line, dark hair combed back away from the face, visible deep blue suit collar and silver tie at the bottom edge of frame; in the background on the right side, Hạ An, a woman in her mid-twenties with oval face, delicate features, black shoulder-length hair with air bangs, white stand-collar shirt, hands clasped tightly together, her figure soft and out of focus due to shallow depth of field. Background shows the dimly lit Shengshi Group CEO office at night with floor-to-ceiling windows revealing city skyline, black desk with folder and pen on the left, gray sofa set and glass coffee table on the right, dark wood floors, all partially blurred. Lighting features a hard key light from the left casting sharp shadows across Thẩm Mặc's face with a distinct catchlight in his eyes, cool blue-white dominant color tone with a slight warm hue on Hạ An, shallow depth of field at T2.8. Artwork rendered in cgstyle_9b with ultimate CG texture, Iray skin rendering with translucent rosy smooth skin, realistic physical light and shadow, cinematic render quality, 2.5D semi-realistic style. Enhanced facial features with sharply defined structure, cold penetrating eyes with natural highlights, smooth skin surface with ultra-high detail texture under hard light, cinematic portrait quality.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] The CEO office of the Shengshi Group at night. Floor-to-ceiling windows prominently display the city skyline. On the left side, a black desk holds a folder and a pen. On the right side against the wall, a gray sofa set and a glass coffee table. The room is evenly lit by hidden ceiling light strips and spotlights, with dark wood floors extending to the windows. The environment is completely static, with no movement.
[Characters] Thẩm Mặc: Male, thirty, sharp jaw and defined face, eagle-like eyes, slanted brows, high nose, thin lips, dark hair combed back. Visible wearing a deep blue suit jacket collar and silver tie. Current emotional state: cold and emotionless. Hạ An: Female, twenty-five, oval face, delicate jawline, willow-leaf eyebrows, large almond-shaped eyes with a melancholic gaze, black shoulder-length hair with air bangs. Wearing a white stand-collar shirt. Current emotional state: anxious and tense.
Shot 1 (Over-the-Shoulder Close-Up, 2.32s): Static camera, environment remains unchanged.
Thẩm Mặc: "I will pay all hospital fees for your mother."
Action: Slow motion. Thẩm Mặc's lips begin to form the words, his jaw subtly tightening with cold precision, his gaze remaining unyielding and cold. Hạ An remains still in the background, a faint quiver in her clasped hands reflecting her anxiety.
